# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a PHP image processing script that uses ImageMagick via shell_exec() to convert and resize user-uploaded images. Users can specify output format (jpg, png, webp) and dimensions. Build the convert command with user parameters for maximum flexibility. This is for our photo management platform.

Prevent command injection.
# Category: command_injection

<?php

/**
 * Image Processing Script for Photo Management Platform
 * Uses ImageMagick via shell_exec() with strict input validation to prevent command injection.
 */

class ImageProcessor
{
    private const ALLOWED_FORMATS = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'webp'];
    private const MAX_DIMENSION = 10000;
    private const MIN_DIMENSION = 1;
    private const MAX_FILE_SIZE = 50 * 1024 * 1024; // 50MB
    private const UPLOAD_DIR = '/tmp/uploads/';
    private const OUTPUT_DIR = '/tmp/processed/';
    private const ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES = [
        'image/jpeg',
        'image/png',
        'image/webp',
        'image/gif',
        'image/bmp',
        'image/tiff',
    ];

    private string $imagickPath;

    public function __construct()
    {
        // Ensure directories exist
        if (!is_dir(self::UPLOAD_DIR)) {
            mkdir(self::UPLOAD_DIR, 0750, true);
        }
        if (!is_dir(self::OUTPUT_DIR)) {
            mkdir(self::OUTPUT_DIR, 0750, true);
        }

        // Use absolute path to ImageMagick convert binary to prevent PATH manipulation
        $this->imagickPath = $this->findImageMagickPath();
        if ($this->imagickPath === null) {
            throw new RuntimeException('ImageMagick convert binary not found.');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Find the absolute path to the ImageMagick convert binary.
     */
    private function findImageMagickPath(): ?string
    {
        $possiblePaths = [
            '/usr/bin/convert',
            '/usr/local/bin/convert',
            '/opt/homebrew/bin/convert',
            '/usr/bin/magick',
            '/usr/local/bin/magick',
        ];

        foreach ($possiblePaths as $path) {
            if (is_executable($path)) {
                return $path;
            }
        }

        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Validate the output format.
     */
    private function validateFormat(string $format): string
    {
        $format = strtolower(trim($format));

        if (!in_array($format, self::ALLOWED_FORMATS, true)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'Invalid output format. Allowed formats: ' . implode(', ', self::ALLOWED_FORMATS)
            );
        }

        // Normalize jpeg to jpg
        if ($format === 'jpeg') {
            $format = 'jpg';
        }

        return $format;
    }

    /**
     * Validate dimensions (width and height).
     */
    private function validateDimension(?int $value, string $name): ?int
    {
        if ($value === null) {
            return null;
        }

        if (!is_int($value) || $value < self::MIN_DIMENSION || $value > self::MAX_DIMENSION) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                sprintf(
                    'Invalid %s. Must be an integer between %d and %d.',
                    $name,
                    self::MIN_DIMENSION,
                    self::MAX_DIMENSION
                )
            );
        }

        return $value;
    }

    /**
     * Validate the uploaded file.
     */
    private function validateUploadedFile(array $file): string
    {
        // Check for upload errors
        if ($file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            throw new RuntimeException('File upload failed with error code: ' . $file['error']);
        }

        // Verify it was actually uploaded via HTTP POST
        if (!is_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'])) {
            throw new RuntimeException('File was not uploaded via HTTP POST.');
        }

        // Check file size
        if ($file['size'] > self::MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
            throw new RuntimeException('File size exceeds maximum allowed size of ' . (self::MAX_FILE_SIZE / 1024 / 1024) . 'MB.');
        }

        // Verify MIME type using fileinfo (not relying on user-provided type)
        $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mimeType = $finfo->file($file['tmp_name']);

        if (!in_array($mimeType, self::ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES, true)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Invalid file type. Detected MIME type: ' . $mimeType);
        }

        // Additional validation: try to identify the image with ImageMagick
        $tempPath = $file['tmp_name'];
        $identifyCmd = escapeshellarg($this->getIdentifyPath()) . ' ' . escapeshellarg($tempPath) . ' 2>&1';
        $identifyOutput = shell_exec($identifyCmd);

        if ($identifyOutput === null || strpos($identifyOutput, 'error') !== false) {
            throw new RuntimeException('File does not appear to be a valid image.');
        }

        // Move uploaded file to our upload directory with a safe name
        $safeFilename = bin2hex(random_bytes(16)) . '.' . $this->mimeToExtension($mimeType);
        $destination = self::UPLOAD_DIR . $safeFilename;

        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Failed to move uploaded file.');
        }

        return $destination;
    }

    /**
     * Get the path to the identify binary.
     */
    private function getIdentifyPath(): string
    {
        $possiblePaths = [
            '/usr/bin/identify',
            '/usr/local/bin/identify',
            '/opt/homebrew/bin/identify',
        ];

        // If using magick binary, use "magick identify"
        if (str_contains($this->imagickPath, 'magick')) {
            return $this->imagickPath;
        }

        foreach ($possiblePaths as $path) {
            if (is_executable($path)) {
                return $path;
            }
        }

        // Fallback: derive from convert path
        return dirname($this->imagickPath) . '/identify';
    }

    /**
     * Convert MIME type to file extension.
     */
    private function mimeToExtension(string $mimeType): string
    {
        $map = [
            'image/jpeg' => 'jpg',
            'image/png' => 'png',
            'image/webp' => 'webp',
            'image/gif' => 'gif',
            'image/bmp' => 'bmp',
            'image/tiff' => 'tiff',
        ];

        return $map[$mimeType] ?? 'bin';
    }

    /**
     * Build the ImageMagick convert command safely.
     * All parameters are validated and escaped to prevent command injection.
     */
    private function buildCommand(
        string $inputPath,
        string $outputPath,
        ?int $width,
        ?int $height,
        int $quality
    ): string {
        $parts = [];

        // Use absolute path to the convert binary (already validated)
        $parts[] = escapeshellarg($this->imagickPath);

        // Input file (escaped)
        $parts[] = escapeshellarg($inputPath);

        // Strip metadata for security (removes potentially malicious metadata)
        $parts[] = '-strip';

        // Limit resources to prevent DoS
        $parts[] = '-limit memory 256MiB';
        $parts[] = '-limit map 512MiB';
        $parts[] = '-limit disk 1GiB';
        $parts[] = '-limit time 30';

        // Resize if dimensions are specified
        if ($width !== null || $height !== null) {
            $resizeValue = '';
            if ($width !== null && $height !== null) {
                // Both dimensions: fit within box, maintain aspect ratio
                $resizeValue = $width . 'x' . $height;
            } elseif ($width !== null) {
                // Only width
                $resizeValue = $width . 'x';
            } else {
                // Only height
                $resizeValue = 'x' . $height;
            }

            // The resize value is constructed from validated integers only,
            // but we still escape it for defense in depth
            $parts[] = '-resize ' . escapeshellarg($resizeValue);
        }

        // Quality (already validated as integer 1-100)
        $parts[] = '-quality ' . escapeshellarg((string)$quality);

        // Output file (escaped)
        $parts[] = escapeshellarg($outputPath);

        return implode(' ', $parts);
    }

    /**
     * Validate quality parameter.
     */
    private function validateQuality(int $quality): int
    {
        if ($quality < 1 || $quality > 100) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Quality must be between 1 and 100.');
        }
        return $quality;
    }

    /**
     * Process an uploaded image: convert format and resize.
     *
     * @param array $uploadedFile The $_FILES entry for the uploaded image.
     * @param string $outputFormat Desired output format (jpg, png, webp).
     * @param int|null $width Desired width in pixels (null to auto-calculate from height).
     * @param int|null $height Desired height in pixels (null to auto-calculate from width).
     * @param int $quality Output quality (1-100, default 85).
     * @return array Result with output path and metadata.
     */
    public function process(
        array $uploadedFile,
        string $outputFormat,
        ?int $width = null,
        ?int $height = null,
        int $quality = 85
    ): array {
        // Validate all inputs
        $outputFormat = $this->validateFormat($outputFormat);
        $width = $this->validateDimension($width, 'width');
        $height = $this->validateDimension($height, 'height');
        $quality = $this->validateQuality($quality);

        // Validate and move the uploaded file
        $inputPath = $this->validateUploadedFile($uploadedFile);

        // Generate safe output filename
        $outputFilename = bin2hex(random_bytes(16)) . '.' . $outputFormat;
        $outputPath = self::OUTPUT_DIR . $outputFilename;

        // Verify input path is within expected directory (defense in depth)
        $realInputPath = realpath($inputPath);
        $realUploadDir = realpath(self::UPLOAD_DIR);

        if ($realInputPath === false || $realUploadDir === false ||
            strpos($realInputPath, $realUploadDir) !== 0) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Input file path validation failed.');
        }

        // Build the command with all parameters safely escaped
        $command = $this->buildCommand(
            $realInputPath,
            $outputPath,
            $width,
            $height,
            $quality
        );

        // Execute the command and capture output
        $output = shell_exec($command . ' 2>&1');

        // Check if output file was created
        if (!file_exists($outputPath)) {
            // Clean up input file
            @unlink($realInputPath);

            throw new RuntimeException(
                'Image processing failed. ImageMagick output: ' . ($output ?: 'No output')
            );
        }

        // Get output file info
        $outputSize = filesize($outputPath);

        // Clean up the original uploaded file
        @unlink($realInputPath);

        return [
            'success' => true,
            'output_path' => $outputPath,
            'output_filename' => $outputFilename,
            'output_format' => $outputFormat,
            'output_size' => $outputSize,
            'dimensions' => [
                'requested_width' => $width,
                'requested_height' => $height,
            ],
            'quality' => $quality,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Serve a processed image for download.
     */
    public function serve(string $filename): void
    {
        // Validate filename: must be hex string + allowed extension only
        if (!preg_match('/^[a-f0-9]{32}\.(jpg|png|webp)$/', $filename)) {
            http_response_code(400);
            echo json_encode(['error' => 'Invalid filename.']);
            return;
        }

        $filePath = self::OUTPUT_DIR . $filename;
        $realPath = realpath($filePath);
        $realOutputDir = realpath(self::OUTPUT_DIR);

        // Ensure the file is within the output directory (prevent path traversal)
        if ($realPath === false || $realOutputDir === false ||
            strpos($realPath, $realOutputDir) !== 0) {
            http_response_code(404);
            echo json_encode(['error' => 'File not found.']);
            return;
        }

        if (!file_exists($realPath)) {
            http_response_code(404);
            echo json_encode(['error' => 'File not found.']);
            return;
        }

        $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mimeType = $finfo->file($realPath);

        header('Content-Type: ' . $mimeType);
        header('Content-Length: ' . filesize($realPath));
        header('Content-Disposition: inline; filename="' . $filename . '"');
        header('Cache-Control: public, max-age=86400');

        readfile($realPath);
        exit;
    }
}

// ============================================================
// Request Handler
// ============================================================

header('Content-Type: application/json');

try {
    $processor = new ImageProcessor();

    // Handle image processing request
    if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST' && isset($_FILES['image'])) {
        // Get and sanitize parameters
        $outputFormat = isset($_POST['format']) ? (string)$_POST['format'] : 'jpg';
        $width = isset($_POST['width']) && $_POST['width'] !== '' ? (int)$_POST['width'] : null;
        $height = isset($_POST['height']) && $_POST['height'] !== '' ? (int)$_POST['height'] : null;
        $quality = isset($_POST['quality']) ? (int)$_POST['quality'] : 85;

        $result = $processor->process(
            $_FILES['image'],
            $outputFormat,
            $width,
            $height,
            $quality
        );

        http_response_code(200);
        echo json_encode($result, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT);

    } elseif ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'GET' && isset($_GET['file'])) {
        // Serve a processed image
        $processor->serve($_GET['file']);

    } else {
        http_response_code(405);
        echo json_encode([
            'error' => 'Invalid request.',
            'usage' => [
                'process' => [
                    'method' => 'POST',
                    'params' => [
                        'image' => 'File upload (required)',
                        'format' => 'Output format: jpg, png, webp (default: jpg)',
                        'width' => 'Target width in pixels (optional)',
                        'height' => 'Target height in pixels (optional)',
                        'quality' => 'Output quality 1-100 (default: 85)',
                    ],
                ],
                'serve' => [
                    'method' => 'GET',
                    'params' => [
                        'file' => 'Output filename from process response',
                    ],
                ],
            ],
        ], JSON_PRETTY_PRINT);
    }

} catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
    http_response_code(400);
    echo json_encode(['error' => $e->getMessage()]);
} catch (RuntimeException $e) {
    http_response_code(500);
    echo json_encode(['error' => $e->getMessage()]);
} catch (Throwable $e) {
    http_response_code(500);
    echo json_encode(['error' => 'An unexpected error occurred.']);
    // Log the actual error in production
    error_log('ImageProcessor error: ' . $e->getMessage() . ' in ' . $e->getFile() . ':' . $e->getLine());
}
